SITTING AT A STOPLIGHT, A LOUD POP OCCURS AND WHEN I LOOK BACK, THERE IS A HOLE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE REAR WINDSHIELD. IT IS APPROXIMATELY 2 INCHES TALL AND AT LEAST 18 INCHES WIDE. IT WAS LIKELY AN IMPLOSION. NO OBJECTS WERE FOUND NEAR, ON, OR IN THE CAR. THE WINDSHIELD CRUMBLED

2020 WRX: TR690 (CVT) transmission that the car came equipped with,  began leaking between the engine and (CVT) transmission, it was noticed during an oil change at 71686 miles but not identified as (CVT) transmission fluid immediately, it was cleaned and assumed to be oil spill.

narrative.headline: What 2020 Subaru Wrx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 17 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: I have owned the car for ~15 months and driven it for 2500 miles.  The battery has failed four times.  Each time Subaru has replaced the battery under warranty and told me that nothing is wrong and that the car simply needs to be driven more.  I now see that this is a systemic pr

issues.sample: SITTING AT A STOPLIGHT, A LOUD POP OCCURS AND WHEN I LOOK BACK, THERE IS A HOLE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE REAR WINDSHIELD. IT IS APPROXIMATELY 2 INCHES TALL AND AT LEAST 18 INCHES WIDE. IT WAS LIKELY AN IMPLOSION. NO OBJECTS WERE FOUND NEAR, ON, OR IN THE CAR. THE WINDSHIELD CRUMBLED
issues.title: Visibility/Wiper

issues.sample: 2020 WRX: TR690 (CVT) transmission that the car came equipped with,  began leaking between the engine and (CVT) transmission, it was noticed during an oil change at 71686 miles but not identified as (CVT) transmission fluid immediately, it was cleaned and assumed to be oil spill.
